---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for this project
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: ""

---

## 🚀 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see implemented.

## 💡 Motivation
Please explain the motivation behind this feature request:

- **Problem**: What problem does this feature solve?
- **Use Case**: How would you use this feature?
- **Impact**: What impact would this have on your workflow?

## 🎯 Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## 🔄 Alternative Solutions
Please describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## 📋 Acceptance Criteria
What would make this feature complete? Please list specific requirements:

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## 🎨 UI/UX Considerations
If this feature involves user interface changes, please describe:

- **Visual Design**: Any specific visual requirements
- **User Flow**: How users would interact with this feature
- **Accessibility**: Any accessibility considerations

## 🔧 Technical Considerations
- **Integration**: How should this integrate with existing features?
- **Performance**: Any performance requirements or considerations
- **Compatibility**: Any compatibility requirements (macOS versions, etc.)

## 📊 Priority
How important is this feature to you?

- [ ] Critical - Blocker for my use case
- [ ] High - Significant improvement to workflow
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have
- [ ] Low - Minor improvement

## 📎 Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples about the feature request here.

## 🔗 Related Issues
Please link any related issues or discussions:

- Related issue: #
- Related discussion: #
